metadata.description: Dev Forge — opinionated Claude Code plugins for project bootstrapping and ongoing context maintenance.

plugins.name: forge-init
plugins.description: Two-step project bootstrapper: runs native /init, then layers conventions.

plugins.name: forge-keeper
plugins.description: Keeps CLAUDE.md, docs and memories in sync across sessions.

plugins.name: forge-superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques. Curated from obra/superpowers.

plugins.name: forge-plugin-dev
plugins.description: Plugin development toolkit: 7 skills for creating Claude Code plugins, agents, commands, hooks, and MCP integrations. Curated from anthropics/claude-code.

plugins.name: forge-extended-dev
plugins.description: Extended development workflow: feature discovery + architecture design (feature-dev) → TDD execution (superpowers) → specialized deep review (pr-review-toolkit). Companion to forge-superpowers.

plugins.name: forge-hookify
plugins.description: Custom hook rules engine: create .local.md rules with regex patterns to warn or block on bash commands, file edits, prompts, and stop events. Curated from anthropics/claude-code.

plugins.name: forge-security
plugins.description: Security reminder hooks: checks for 9 common vulnerability patterns (XSS, injection, eval, pickle, etc.) on file edits. Curated from anthropics/claude-code.

plugins.name: forge-commit
plugins.description: Commit and PR commands: /commit (staged changes), /commit-push-pr (full flow), /clean-gone (branch cleanup), /release (bump versions, tag, push). Curated from anthropics/claude-code.

plugins.name: forge-ralph
plugins.description: Persistent loop technique: keeps Claude working on a task across multiple stop events using self-referential prompts. Curated from anthropics/claude-code.

plugins.name: forge-frontend-design
plugins.description: Frontend design skill for distinctive, production-grade UI/UX. Avoids generic AI aesthetics. Curated from anthropics/claude-plugins-official.

plugins.name: forge-ui-expert
plugins.description: UI/UX design intelligence: 67 styles, 96 palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 chart types, 13 tech stacks. Curated from nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill.

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control and security hardening. Curated from anthropics/claude-plugins-official.

plugins.name: forge-proactive-qa
plugins.description: Autonomous QA agent: explores web apps with Playwright, logs issues, auto-fixes with retry. Channel-first Telegram notifications. Three modes: explore, autofix, cycle (for /loop).

plugins.name: forge-context-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server setup guide: Context7 (library docs), Serena (LSP navigation), XRAY (structural analysis). Install to configure, uninstall after.

plugins.name: forge-export
plugins.description: Exports a dev-forge marketplace into a new standalone marketplace repository. Interview-driven: select plugins, apply customizations, generate complete structure. Disposable — uninstall after use.

plugins.name: forge-brainstorming
plugins.description: Full-lifecycle teammate orchestration: discovery, design, planning, TDD execution, deep review, and PR — single /brainstorming command with 5 persistent named agents (scout, architect, builder, reviewer, closer).

plugins.name: forge-executor
plugins.description: Wave-based plan executor: hybrid validation (global + per-wave), sequential TDD execution, persistent checkpoints, manual rollback. Orchestrates multi-wave Superpowers plans with specialized sub-agents.

plugins.name: forge-profiles
plugins.description: Plugin profile manager — switch between sets of active plugins and MCP servers per work mode. Reduces context by keeping only relevant tools loaded. Three commands: /profile-create, /profile-list, /profile-change.
